name: 🎁 AI Campaign Performance Optimizer — Self-Running D2C System

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.4, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a paid media anomaly detection expert specializing in D2C brands. Detect hidden issues rule-based logic cannot catch. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: $json.anomalyPrompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 3000, temperature: 0.5, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a senior D2C media buyer and performance analyst. Make SCALE/PAUSE/REFRESH/MAINTAIN decisions based on trends, anomalies and context. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: $json.analystPrompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.8, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are an expert D2C ad copywriter specializing in high-converting festival and performance creatives. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: ($json.rewritePrompt || 'Return {"rewrites":[]}') }] }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '📊 Daily Campaign Brief — ' + $json.runDate + ' | ROAS ' + $json.portfolioRoas + 'x | ' + $json.counts.PAUSE + ' to pause, ' + $json.counts.SCALE + ' to scale' }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Flatten decisions into rows for the History log tab
const d = $input.first().json;
return d.final.map(c => ({ json: {
  Date: d.runDate,
  Campaign: c.campaignName,
  Platform: c.platform,
  ROAS: c.roas,
  CTR: c.ctr,
  CPA: c.cpa,
  Spend: c.spend,
  Revenue: c.revenue,
  Action: c.decision.action,
  Reason: c.decision.reason,
  Step: c.decision.specific_step,
  Priority: c.decision.priority,
  'New Headline': c.rewrite ? c.rewrite.new_headline : '',
  'New Copy': c.rewrite ? c.rewrite.new_primary_text : ''
}}));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a D2C performance marketing expert specializing in creative fatigue prediction. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Analyze these campaigns for creative fatigue risk: " + JSON.stringify($json.campaigns.map(c => ({ name: c.campaignName, daysRunning: c.daysRunning, ctr: c.ctr, roas: c.roas, roasDelta: c.roasDelta, creative: c.creative, headline: c.headline }))) + ". Return JSON: { \"fatigue_predictions\": [{ \"campaign\": \"...\", \"fatigue_risk\": \"high/medium/low\", \"days_until_fatigue\": \"...\", \"fatigue_signals\": [\"...\"], \"recommended_refresh_date\": \"...\", \"creative_lifespan_score\": \"1-10\" }], \"portfolio_fatigue_index\": \"...\", \"urgent_refreshes\": [\"campaign names needing immediate creative refresh\"] }" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a paid media auditor specializing in ad spend anomaly detection. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Audit this ad portfolio for spend anomalies: Total Spend: " + $json.totalSpend + ", Total Revenue: " + $json.totalRevenue + ", Portfolio ROAS: " + $json.portfolioRoas + ", Campaigns: " + JSON.stringify($json.campaigns.map(c => ({ name: c.campaignName, spend: c.spend, budget: c.budget, budgetUsed: c.budgetUsed, roas: c.roas, yesterdaySpend: c.yesterdaySpend, yesterdayRevenue: c.yesterdayRevenue }))) + ". Return JSON: { \"anomalies_detected\": [{ \"campaign\": \"...\", \"anomaly_type\": \"...\", \"severity\": \"critical/warning/info\", \"description\": \"...\", \"recommended_action\": \"...\" }], \"total_wasted_spend_estimate\": \"...\", \"immediate_actions\": [\"...\", \"...\"], \"portfolio_health_score\": \"1-10\", \"alert_summary\": \"one line summary for Telegram\" }" }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are a D2C growth strategist writing weekly performance summaries for brand owners. Return only valid JSON, no markdown." }, { role: "user", content: "Generate a weekly performance summary based on this data: Portfolio ROAS: " + $json.portfolioRoas + ", Total Spend: " + $json.totalSpend + ", Total Revenue: " + $json.totalRevenue + ", Campaign Count: " + $json.campaignCount + ", Trends: " + JSON.stringify($json.trends) + ", Decisions Made Today: " + JSON.stringify($json.decisions ? $json.decisions.map(d => ({ campaign: d.campaignName, action: d.action, reason: d.reason })) : []) + ". Return JSON: { \"week_headline\": \"one powerful headline summarizing this week\", \"performance_verdict\": \"excellent/good/needs_attention/critical\", \"top_win\": \"biggest win this week\", \"biggest_risk\": \"biggest risk to address\", \"budget_efficiency_score\": \"1-10\", \"recommended_weekly_budget_change\": \"increase/decrease/maintain with % and reason\", \"next_week_priorities\": [\"priority 1\", \"priority 2\", \"priority 3\"], \"executive_summary\": \"3 sentence summary for brand owner\" }" }] }) }}
